tasks.title: Sync CLAUDE.md with Laser Glow design system
tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md to reflect the current 'Laser Glow + Apple-inspired' design system. Remove all Luminous Canvas (gold/ivory) references and document the correct CSS tokens, typography rules, and section rhythm (black ↔ light-gray alternation).

subtasks.title: Update color token documentation
Update typography documentation to Inter + Cairo
Document Apple section-rhythm utility classes

tasks.title: Cinematic Home Page overhaul
tasks.description: Redesign the Home page using the cinematic Apple-inspired section rhythm: alternating full-bleed black (section-dark) and light-gray (section-light) sections. Hero: black bg, 56px headline, laser-gradient glow on brand name, two pill CTAs. Philosophy: light-gray, stats grid. Treatments: black section, card grid. CTA strip: light-gray.

subtasks.title: Rewrite Home.jsx with cinematic section structure
Rewrite Home.css for full-bleed sections and Apple rhythm
Generate premium hero clinic image asset
Test in EN (LTR) and AR (RTL)

tasks.title: Services page — Apple product-grid layout
tasks.description: Redesign the Services page as an Apple-style product catalogue. Each service is a tile: image on #f5f5f7, service name as card-title (28px, weight 400), description at 14px, price badge, and pill CTA. Two-up → three-up grid depending on viewport.

subtasks.title: Rewrite Services.jsx with tile-based layout
Rewrite Services.css
Add category filter strip
Create Services page product-grid layout structure
subtasks.description: Implement the basic HTML structure for the Services page with Apple-style product grid layout using CSS Grid or Flexbox
subtasks.details: Set up the main container with responsive grid layout that adapts from two-up to three-up based on viewport width. Create individual service tile components with proper semantic HTML structure including image placeholder, title, description, price badge, and CTA button.

subtasks.title: Implement service tile styling with Apple design patterns
subtasks.description: Apply Apple-inspired styling to service tiles including background color, typography, and visual elements
subtasks.details: Style service tiles with #f5f5f7 background, 28px font size with weight 400 for titles, 14px description text, price badges with appropriate styling, and pill-shaped CTA buttons. Implement responsive behavior for different screen sizes and ensure proper spacing and alignment.

subtasks.title: Add responsive grid behavior for different viewports
subtasks.description: Implement responsive grid behavior that changes from two-up to three-up layout based on screen size
subtasks.details: Use CSS media queries to implement responsive grid behavior with appropriate breakpoints. Ensure tiles stack vertically on mobile, display two per row on tablets, and three per row on desktop screens. Test with various screen sizes and ensure proper spacing and alignment.

subtasks.title: Integrate service data into grid layout
subtasks.description: Connect the Services page to retrieve and display actual service data in the product grid
subtasks.details: Implement data fetching logic to retrieve service information from backend or static data source. Map service data to individual tile components and ensure proper data binding. Handle loading states and error cases gracefully.

subtasks.title: Test and validate Services page layout across devices
subtasks.description: Perform comprehensive testing of the Services page layout across different devices and screen sizes
subtasks.details: Test responsive behavior on mobile, tablet, and desktop screens. Verify that grid layout adjusts properly, typography remains readable, and all interactive elements function correctly. Conduct accessibility testing and ensure proper contrast ratios and keyboard navigation support.

subtasks.title: Create Services tile component with Apple-style design
subtasks.description: Develop a reusable tile component for services that matches Apple's design language with image background, title, description, price badge, and CTA button
subtasks.details: Implement a React component with styled-components or CSS modules that creates a service tile with #f5f5f7 background, 28px title font weight 400, 14px description text, price badge styling, and pill-shaped CTA button. Include responsive design for different viewport sizes.

subtasks.title: Implement responsive grid layout for services tiles
subtasks.description: Create a responsive grid system that displays two tiles per row on medium screens and three tiles per row on large screens
subtasks.details: Use CSS Grid or Flexbox to create a responsive layout that automatically adjusts the number of columns based on viewport width. Implement media queries for breakpoints at 768px and 1024px to achieve two-up and three-up layouts respectively.

subtasks.title: Integrate service data into tile components
subtasks.description: Fetch and display service data from API or static data source within the tile components
subtasks.details: Create data fetching logic that retrieves service information (name, description, image, price) and maps it to the tile component. Implement loading states and error handling for data fetching operations.

subtasks.title: Style service tile elements according to Apple design specs
subtasks.description: Apply precise styling to service tile elements including typography, spacing, and visual hierarchy matching Apple's aesthetic
subtasks.details: Implement exact styling requirements including 28px title font weight 400, 14px description text, proper spacing between elements, and #f5f5f7 background color. Add hover effects and transitions to match Apple's premium feel.

subtasks.title: Test and validate responsive services grid across devices
subtasks.description: Verify that the services grid layout works correctly across different screen sizes and devices
subtasks.details: Conduct cross-browser and cross-device testing to ensure the responsive grid layout functions correctly on mobile, tablet, and desktop screens. Validate that the two-up to three-up transition occurs at appropriate breakpoints and that all elements display correctly.

subtasks.title: Create Services tile component with Apple-style design
subtasks.description: Develop a reusable tile component for services with Apple-inspired styling including image background, title, description, price badge, and CTA
subtasks.details: Implement a React component with styled-components or CSS modules that follows Apple's design language with #f5f5f7 background, 28px title font weight 400, 14px description, price badge styling, and pill CTA button

subtasks.title: Implement responsive grid layout for service tiles
subtasks.description: Create a responsive grid system that displays 2-up on mobile and 3-up on desktop viewports
subtasks.details: Use CSS Grid or Flexbox with media queries to create a responsive layout that adjusts from 2 columns on small screens to 3 columns on larger screens, ensuring proper spacing and alignment

subtasks.title: Integrate service data into tile components
subtasks.description: Fetch and display service data in the tile components with proper image handling and content formatting
subtasks.details: Create data fetching logic to retrieve service information from API or local data store, map data to tile component props, handle image loading, and ensure proper text formatting for titles, descriptions, and pricing

subtasks.title: Add interactive elements to service tiles
subtasks.description: Implement hover effects, click handlers, and CTA functionality for service tiles
subtasks.details: Add hover states for visual feedback, implement click handlers for CTAs, ensure proper accessibility attributes, and create smooth transitions between states for a polished user experience

subtasks.title: Test and validate responsive service grid
subtasks.description: Conduct comprehensive testing of the responsive grid layout across different viewport sizes
subtasks.details: Test layout behavior on various screen sizes, validate proper grid alignment, ensure no overlapping elements, check that all interactive elements work correctly, and verify that the design maintains Apple's aesthetic principles at all breakpoints

tasks.title: Booking flow — high-trust minimal UI

subtasks.title: Add step indicator (1. Select Service → 2. Date/Time → 3. Confirm)
Style form inputs with laser-glow focus ring
Add success animation on booking submit

tasks.title: Gallery — cinematic before/after showcase
tasks.description: Redesign the Gallery page with masonry or publication-style layout. Before/after slider on image pairs. Dark section backgrounds, no borders on cards.

subtasks.title: Implement before/after slider component
Masonry layout for gallery grid

tasks.title: Auth page — glassmorphism treatment
tasks.description: Polish Auth (sign in / sign up) to use a full-bleed background image with a glassmorphism card overlay. Laser-glow accents on active input fields. Smooth tab transition animation.

subtasks.title: Full-bleed background with blur overlay
Glassmorphism card for the form
Laser-glow input focus animation

tasks.title: Mobile responsiveness audit
tasks.description: Audit all pages at 375px, 428px (mobile), 768px (tablet). Fix collapsing grid, nav hamburger menu, hero headline scaling (56px → 40px → 28px).

subtasks.title: Implement mobile hamburger nav
Hero headline responsive scaling
Touch target audit (min 44×44px)

tasks.title: RTL Arabic layout verification
tasks.description: Switch to Arabic and verify all pages render correctly: text direction, icon mirroring, logical CSS properties (margin-inline-start vs margin-left), Cairo font loading.

subtasks.title: Fix any component that relies on left/right instead of logical properties
Verify Cairo font renders correctly at all type scales

tasks.title: Performance & SEO polish
tasks.description: Add proper meta tags to all pages, lazy-load below-fold images, ensure build produces zero warnings (chunk size, missing keys). Add Open Graph tags.

subtasks.title: Add <title> and meta description to all pages via react-helmet or document.title
Lazy-load gallery and treatment images
Code-split large routes with dynamic import()
Add meta tags to all pages
subtasks.description: Implement proper meta tags including description, keywords, and viewport settings for all pages
subtasks.details: Create a meta tag component that can be reused across all pages, ensuring each page has unique meta descriptions and keywords based on content. Include standard meta tags like charset, viewport, and description.

subtasks.title: Implement lazy-loading for below-fold images
subtasks.description: Configure lazy loading for images that appear below the fold to improve page load performance
subtasks.details: Use Intersection Observer API or native loading='lazy' attribute for images below the fold. Implement proper placeholder handling and ensure images load correctly when they come into view.

subtasks.title: Fix build warnings and optimize chunk sizes
subtasks.description: Ensure build process produces zero warnings related to chunk size and missing keys
subtasks.details: Analyze build output for warnings, resolve missing keys in components, optimize chunk splitting, and ensure all dependencies are properly handled to eliminate any build warnings.

subtasks.title: Add Open Graph tags to all pages
subtasks.description: Implement Open Graph meta tags for proper social media sharing across all pages
subtasks.details: Create Open Graph meta tag component with title, description, image, URL, and type properties. Ensure each page has unique OG tags that reflect the specific content being shared.

subtasks.title: Validate SEO and performance improvements
subtasks.description: Test that all SEO and performance optimizations are working correctly across all pages
subtasks.details: Run SEO audits using tools like Lighthouse or PageSpeed Insights, verify meta tags appear correctly in source code, confirm lazy loading works properly, and ensure build warnings are eliminated.

Bookings management with status toggle

subtasks.title: Implement booking status update functionality

subtasks.details: Create booking status update interface with dropdown or button controls, implement API integration for status changes, add proper confirmation dialogs, ensure status history tracking

subtasks.title: Add search and filter capabilities to data tables

subtasks.details: Add search input fields for each table, implement client-side filtering logic, create filter dropdowns for status and date ranges, ensure responsive design for different viewport sizes

subtasks.title: Implement confirmation dialogs for destructive actions

subtasks.details: Create reusable confirmation dialog component, implement modal triggers for delete operations, add status update confirmation, ensure proper user feedback and undo capabilities, style dialogs according to design system

tasks.title: Sentry error monitoring integration
tasks.description: Add @sentry/react with ErrorBoundary, session replay, browser tracing. DSN via VITE_SENTRY_DSN env var. sendDefaultPii disabled.

tasks.title: Security hardening
tasks.description: Sentry DSN to env var, PII disabled, profile whitelist, token removed from git history.

tasks.title: Documentation update v1.2.0
tasks.description: Updated CLAUDE.md, README.md, README.ar.md to v1.2.0.

tasks.title: Booking Confirmation: Email Notifications
tasks.description: Implement automated email notifications for the booking workflow using Supabase Edge Functions and Resend API. When a new booking is created (status: pending), automatically send: 1) A confirmation email to the patient with booking details (service, date, time). 2) An alert email to the admin notifying them of the new booking. When the admin changes status to 'confirmed' in the Admin Panel, send a confirmation email to the patient. Tech stack: Supabase Edge Function (Deno), Resend API for email delivery.

subtasks.title: Set up Supabase Edge Function for Email Notifications
subtasks.description: Create and configure a Supabase Edge Function using Deno to handle booking-related email notifications
subtasks.details: Initialize a new Supabase Edge Function project with Deno runtime, configure environment variables for Resend API key, set up function triggers for booking insert and update events, and implement basic function structure with proper error handling

subtasks.title: Implement Resend API Integration for Email Delivery
subtasks.description: Integrate Resend API to send automated emails for booking confirmations and admin alerts
subtasks.details: Create Resend API client configuration in the Edge Function, implement email template rendering for patient confirmations and admin alerts, set up email sending functions with proper error handling, and test API connectivity with Resend service

subtasks.title: Create Email Templates for Booking Confirmations
subtasks.description: Design and implement email templates for patient confirmations and admin notifications
subtasks.details: Develop HTML email templates for patient confirmation emails with booking details (service, date, time), create admin alert email templates with new booking notifications, implement template rendering logic with dynamic data injection, and ensure responsive design for email clients

subtasks.title: Implement Booking Status Change Trigger Logic
subtasks.description: Set up logic to send confirmation emails when admin changes booking status to confirmed
subtasks.details: Add logic to detect when booking status changes from pending to confirmed, implement function to send patient confirmation email upon status update, create proper database query logic to fetch booking details for email content, and ensure trigger fires only on specific status changes

subtasks.title: Test and Deploy Email Notification System
subtasks.description: Conduct comprehensive testing of the email notification system and deploy to production
subtasks.details: Perform end-to-end testing of all email scenarios (new booking creation, status update), test email delivery to various recipients, validate email content and formatting, conduct performance testing of Edge Function, and deploy final implementation to Supabase with proper monitoring setup

tasks.title: Booking Confirmation: WhatsApp Notification to Admin
tasks.description: When a new booking is submitted (status: pending), automatically send a WhatsApp message to the clinic admin number (077 030 0173) with the booking details: patient name, service, date, and time. Use WhatsApp Business Cloud API or Twilio WhatsApp API via a Supabase Edge Function trigger. This gives the admin an instant mobile alert for every new appointment without needing to check the dashboard.

tasks.title: Admin Panel: New Booking Badge and Real-time Notifications
tasks.description: Add a real-time notification badge to the Admin Panel to alert admins of new pending bookings without refreshing the page. Features: 1) A red badge counter on the Bookings tab showing the number of unreviewed pending bookings. 2) Use Supabase Realtime (postgres_changes) to subscribe to new inserts in the bookings table and update the counter live. 3) Optional: Add a toast notification popup in the bottom corner of the admin panel whenever a new booking comes in.
